creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Sun Oct 20 11:57:52 2013
New Revision: 331008
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331008

Log:
  multimedia/qmmp: update to 0.7.3
  
  - Update to 0.7.3
  - Disable legacy ffmpeg
  - Fix staging
  
  PR:		ports/177793
  Submitted by:	RyoTa SimaMoto <liangtai.s4 gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/multimedia/qmmp/Makefile
  head/multimedia/qmmp/distinfo
  head/multimedia/qmmp/pkg-plist

Modified: head/multimedia/qmmp/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/qmmp/Makefile	Sun Oct 20 11:48:55 2013	(r331007)
+++ head/multimedia/qmmp/Makefile	Sun Oct 20 11:57:52 2013	(r331008)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	qmmp
-PORTVERSION=	0.7.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.7.3
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
 MASTER_SITES=	http://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/files/ \
 		${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ USE_QT4=	corelib gui network xml \
 		qmake_build rcc_build uic_build moc_build linguist_build
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
+OPTIONS_SINGLE=	MPLAYER
 OPTIONS_SINGLE_MPLAYER=	MPLAYER1 MPLAYER2
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	ALSA ANALYZER APIDOC BS2B CDIO CONVERTER COPYPASTE \
 		COVER CROSSFADE CUE CURL DIR_ASSOC DOCS ENCA FAAD \
@@ -66,7 +67,6 @@ QMMP_DIALOG_DESC=	An original dialog
 MPLAYER1_DESC=	mplayer-1.1.x (multimedia/mplayer)
 MPLAYER2_DESC=	mplayer-2.0.x (multimedia/mplayer2)
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MAPIDOC}
@@ -153,6 +153,8 @@ PLIST_SUB+=	GME="@comment "
 PLUGIN_OPTIONS_CMAKE+=	-DUSE_GME:BOOL=FALSE
 .endif
 
+PLUGIN_OPTIONS_CMAKE+=	-DUSE_FFMPEG_LEGACY:BOOL=FALSE
+
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MFFMPEG}
 LIB_DEPENDS+=	libavcodec.so:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/ffmpeg
 PLIST_SUB+=	FFMPEG=""
@@ -541,20 +543,22 @@ post-build:
 .endif
 
 post-install:
-	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}
-	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_MAN} ${PORTDOCS} ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}; \
+	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_MAN} ${PORTDOCS} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+.endif
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MAPIDOC}
-	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}/html/search ; \
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/html/search ; \
 	cd ${WRKSRC}/doc/html && \
-		${INSTALL_MAN} *.html *.png *.css ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}/html ; \
+		${INSTALL_MAN} *.html *.png *.css ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/html ; \
 	cd ${WRKSRC}/doc/html/search && \
-		${INSTALL_MAN} *.html *.png *.css *.js ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}/html/search ; \
+		${INSTALL_MAN} *.html *.png *.css *.js ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/html/search ; \
 	${RM} -f ${WRKDIR}/PLIST.doc ; \
-	${FIND} ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}/html -type f | \
-		${SED} 's|${STAGEDIR}/${PREFIX}/||' \
+	${FIND} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/html -type f | \
+		${SED} 's|${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/||' \
 		>> ${WRKDIR}/PLIST.doc ; \
-	${FIND} ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}/html -type d | \
-		${SED} 's|${STAGEDIR}/${PREFIX}/|@dirrm |' \
+	${FIND} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/html -type d | \
+		${SED} 's|${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/|@dirrm |' \
 		| ${SORT} -r >> ${WRKDIR}/PLIST.doc ; \
 	cd ${WRKDIR} ; ${SED} -i -e '/PLIST.doc/ r PLIST.doc' ${TMPPLIST}
 .endif

Modified: head/multimedia/qmmp/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/qmmp/distinfo	Sun Oct 20 11:48:55 2013	(r331007)
+++ head/multimedia/qmmp/distinfo	Sun Oct 20 11:57:52 2013	(r331008)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (qmmp-0.7.2.tar.bz2) = 8e6b50ced58e247972060bb5a5156ea2c74b03f33df92e87591d09f685b82081
-SIZE (qmmp-0.7.2.tar.bz2) = 847558
+SHA256 (qmmp-0.7.3.tar.bz2) = 57e4e1a00450a5a094b290df5410f8ab5a80da364ad3f1402835573cb0b75562
+SIZE (qmmp-0.7.3.tar.bz2) = 848638

Modified: head/multimedia/qmmp/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/qmmp/pkg-plist	Sun Oct 20 11:48:55 2013	(r331007)
+++ head/multimedia/qmmp/pkg-plist	Sun Oct 20 11:57:52 2013	(r331008)
@@ -81,7 +81,6 @@ lib/qmmp/CommandLineOptions/libstatusopt
 %%CDIO%%lib/qmmp/Input/libcdaudio.so
 %%CUE%%lib/qmmp/Input/libcue.so
 %%FFMPEG%%lib/qmmp/Input/libffmpeg.so
-%%FFMPEG_LEGACY%%lib/qmmp/Input/libffmpeg_legacy.so
 %%FLAC%%lib/qmmp/Input/libflac.so
 %%MAD%%lib/qmmp/Input/libmad.so
 %%MODPLUG%%lib/qmmp/Input/libmodplug.so
